name: Check OIDC Machine Login
description: Verifies end-to-end OIDC machine login: reads test credentials from the Zitadel dependency, obtains a JWT via client_credentials grant, and calls the deployer API with the token.

parameters.name: Check OIDC Machine Login
parameters.description: Set to true to verify end-to-end OIDC machine login.

parameters.name: Zitadel VM ID
parameters.description: VM ID of the Zitadel dependency container.
